steps.title: Use the roots
steps.content:
The graph passes through $(8,0)$ and $(-3,0)$, so the roots are $8$ and $-3$. Therefore
$$
f(x)=a(x-8)(x+3)
$$
for some integer $a>1$.

steps.title: Find a plus b
steps.content:
Expand the factors:
$$
f(x)=a(x^2-5x-24)=ax^2-5ax-24a
$$
So $b=-5a$, and
$$
a+b=a-5a=-4a
$$

steps.title: Test the possible values
steps.content: Since $a$ is an integer greater than $1$, $-4a$ must be a negative multiple of $4$ less than $-4$. Only $-8$ works, with $a=2$. The answer is D.
